notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Kyle Tucker out at 2nd. Alex Freeland out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Henry Bolte GIDP
